description_long: This is a large, two-story suburban house with a symmetrical facade, gray gable roof, and white exterior walls. The front features a prominent double-door entryway with a small porch and steps, flanked by evenly spaced windows. The house is surrounded by a landscaped yard with a mix of green and purple-leaved trees, creating a pleasant residential setting. The rear of the house has a wooden deck that extends outward, providing outdoor living space. The windows are arranged in neat, symmetrical rows on both floors, and the roof includes dormer windows for added architectural interest. The overall design suggests a blend of Colonial and modern suburban styles, with clean lines and balanced proportions.
description: A large, two-story white house with a gray gable roof, symmetrical windows, and a wooden deck, surrounded by landscaped trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with double doors, porch steps, and symmetrical window arrangement, framed by trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house, the wooden deck, and a cluster of trees on the right.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full width of the wooden deck, back windows, and a more private yard area with trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the house's length, roof structure, and additional trees near the deck.
attribute_entryway_design: Double-door entry with small porch, steps, and minimal decorative elements
